name: labor_model
description: Labor Model — service-type sqft/day baselines for an experienced cleaner, then complexity multipliers. 1 LU = 1 person-hour at the selected service intensity.

historic.description: Inferred from year_built, historic district, trim priors

luxury.description: Inferred from finishes, marble/glass priors, sqft band

layout.description: Inferred from stories, beds/baths, floor-plan complexity

density.description: Inferred from property_type, clutter prior, unit density

inference.notes: Do not hardcode luxury=7. Infer complexity from property + cleaning profile features.

deep.description: Deep clean — average experienced cleaner covers ~800 sqft in an 8-hour day

standard.description: Standard clean — average experienced cleaner covers ~1750 sqft in an 8-hour day

light.description: Light / maintenance clean — average experienced cleaner covers ~2500 sqft in an 8-hour day
